PowerShell($port = 8080; $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $\($p.OwningProcess\) on port 8080"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } else { Write-Host "No process on port 8080" })

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:8080/api"; Write-Host "===== 1. 注册用户 ====="; $reg = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$base/users/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@example.com","password":"123456","nickname":"测试用户"}'; $reg | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:8080/api"; Write-Host "===== 2. 登录 ====="; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$base/users/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@example.com","password":"123456"}'; $login | ConvertTo-Json; $token = $login.data.token; Write-Host "`n===== 3. 获取分类列表 ====="; $cats = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$base/categories" -Method GET -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $cats.data | Select-Object id,name,type | Format-Table; Write-Host "===== 4. 创建自定义分类 ====="; $newCat = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$base/categories" -Method POST -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"name":"学习","type":"EXPENSE"}'; $newCat.data | Select-Object id,name,type; $catId = $newCat.data.id)

PowerShell($api = "http://localhost:8080/api"; Write-Host "▶ Step 2: 登录获取 Token"; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$api/users/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"e2e@test.com","password":"abc123"}'; $token = $login.data.token; Write-Host "  Token: $\($token.Substring\(0,30\)\)..."; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "▶ Step 3: 获取默认分类 \(应该8个\)"; $cats = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$api/categories/list" -Method POST -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{}'; Write-Host "  分类数: $\($cats.data.Count\)"; $cats.data | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "    $\($_.type\) - $\($_.name\)" })
